title: dryopteris manipurensis
intro: Dryopteris manipurensis, also known as the Manipuri lady fern, is a species of fern native to the Northeast Indian region, specifically the state of Manipur. The plant is used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris manipurensis include its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
